name: SeverityCode
title: Severity Code
description:
This subset contains concepts that represent a range of severities from mild to fatal.

This subset is intended to be both a data exchange subset to support semantic interoperability and conformance testing, and a data capture subset that is implemented at the point of care.

This subset was defined using the intensional definition of <272141005\|Severities (qualifier value)\| against the substrate SNOMED CT Canadian Edition.

This resource is an informative value set; a normative subset containing the expanded values can be found on Canada Health Infoway's [Terminology Server](https://terminologystandardsservice.ca/fhir). The [direct link](https://fhir.infoway-inforoute.ca/ValueSet/severitycode) to the ValueSet on the Terminology Server will require an [InfoCentral account](https://infocentral.infoway-inforoute.ca/en/register) account for access.
